introSection: Self-Spinning Pulley (Chinese: 自旋滑车) is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Chuanlord Holiday Manor in Shunde, Foshan, Guangdong, China. It replaced the former Spinning Coaster.
fullText:
Self-Spinning Pulley (Chinese: 自旋滑车) is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster located at Chuanlord Holiday Manor in Shunde, Foshan, Guangdong, China. It replaced the former Spinning Coaster.



Riders sit facing back-to-back.
